description: Systematically verify and persist free canonical procurement portal IDs/codes for nearby Los Angeles County cities, water/wastewater agencies, ports, and special districts. Use the ProcurementSource parent/sub-source hierarchy; prioritize PlanetBids, OpenGov, PublicPurchase, agency pages, LA County/City canonical systems, and keep BidNet disabled/discovery-only.
title: Expand procurement source IDs into Los Angeles County
